title: Replace placeholder QR code with uploaded payment QR image

requirements.text: Save the user-uploaded payment QR code image as the static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png, replacing any existing placeholder or previous version of that file.

quotes: This is the payment qr scanner

acceptanceCriteria: The file frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png is the actual uploaded QR code image provided by the user.
The existing PaymentSection.tsx continues to reference the same path (frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png) without any code changes required.
The QR code rendered in the payment flow displays the actual uploaded image, not a placeholder.

constraints: Do not modify PaymentSection.tsx logic or flow — only the image asset is being updated.
The asset path must remain frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png to stay consistent with the existing component reference.
nonGoals: Changing the payment flow steps or WhatsApp redirect logic.
Updating any UPI ID or business number.
Modifying any other components or sections.

edits: Replace the existing QR placeholder with the user-uploaded actual payment QR code image (google-pay-qr.png > google-pay-qr.dim_400x400.png)
